name: Warm Garlic Balsamic Dressing
recipeIngredient: 8 large cloves garlic, cut into 1/4 to 1/2 inch dice (8 to 10)
salt and freshly ground black pepper
6 tablespoons high-quality commercial balsamic vinegar, (6 to 7)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium skillet, combine the diced garlic, olive oil, salt, and pepper.
2. Cook over medium-low heat until the garlic is soft and lightly golden-blonde. Do not let it darken or burn; discard if necessary and start again.
3. Add the balsamic vinegar, red wine vinegar, and brown sugar to the skillet.
4. Simmer for 2 to 3 minutes.
5. Taste a sample first (it will be hot) to ensure there is gentle acidity and an appropriate sweet/tart balance. Adjust by adding more vinegar if needed and continue simmering until desired.
6. Remove from heat, cover, and keep warm until just before serving (up to 3 hours).
7. Taste again, adjusting seasonings as necessary.
8. Heat up the dressing and spoon over salad.
